DISCOVERY 612, PLAINTIFF ALEX YAKOVLEV'S MOTION FOR SANCTIONS FOR FRAUD, PERJURY, AND WILFUL REFUSAL TO PAY JUDGMENT IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. THE NOTICE WAS INSUFFICIENT PER C.C.P. SECTIONS 1005 AND 1013. THE 16TH COURT DAY AFTER SERVICE IS MAY 27, 2010. THERE IS NO INDICATION THAT THERE WAS EVER ANY AGREEMENT TO ACCEPT SERVICE OF MOTIONS BY FAX. PLAINTIFF APPEARED BY TELEPHONE; NO APPEARANCE MADE BY DEFENDANT. TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.

DISCOVERY 612, PLAINTIFF ALEX YAKOVLEV'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Request For Production Of Documents; Request For Reasonable Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-09-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Alex Yakovlev, self represented plaintiff and moving party appeared via telephone.
No other appearance.

The tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF ALEX YAKOVLEV's Motion To Compel Responses To Request For Production Of Documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.

Notice And Motion For Sanctions For Fraud, Perjury And Wilful Refusal To Pay Judgment
Off Calendar May-26-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Alex Yakovlev, Plaintiff appeared telephonically; No appearances made by Plantiff

RULING: TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: PLAINTIFF ALEX YAKOVLEV's Motion For Sanctions For Fraud, Perjury, And Wilful Refusal To Pay Judgment is ordered off calendar. The notice was insufficient per C.C.P. Sections 1005 and 1013. The 16th court day after service is May 27, 2010. There is no indication that there was ever any agreement to accept service of motions by fax. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-05-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Aug-20-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Dave Davenport.
Matter heard with case #454055.
Plaintiff: Alex Yakovlev, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court taken the matter under submission.
Proposed Judgment rec'd in court.

Aug. 20, 2007
Judgment granted for Damages in the amount of $550.00, matter consolidated with case #454055 for both Prove-Up Trial and Judgment. Lead case #453097.
